name: Chocolate Malt Shoppe Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons instant chocolate malted milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cookie crumbs and butter; press into a 9-inch pie pan. Freeze.
2. Meanwhile, blend the melted ice cream, crushed malted milk balls, and 1 tablespoon of milk in a mixing bowl. Spoon into the crust. Freeze for 1 hour.
3. In a mixing bowl, blend the instant chocolate malted milk powder, marshmallow cream, and remaining milk. Stir in the whipping cream; whip until soft peaks form.
4. Spread over the ice cream layer. Freeze several hours or overnight.
5. Before serving, dollop whipped cream around the edges of the pie and place a malted milk ball on top of each dollop of whipped cream.
